# Extracao: transcription_mp4_51__Trait_50_-_Great_Salespeople_go_way_beyond_just_selling__Don_t_stop_at_just_selling_

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_51__Trait_50_-_Great_Salespeople_go_way_beyond_just_selling__Don_t_stop_at_just_selling_.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Hey, the great salespeople go way beyond just selling. They don't stop at selling. This is where average and good salespeople stop. They sell and they quit servicing. Look, the greats go way beyond selling a product or service and they take responsibility for everything else. And I'm not just talking about follow-up. I'm talking about getting the financing, getting the property appraised. They literally walk all the pieces through. You know, my wife recently delivered a baby and when we went to the doctor, the doctor said, what hospital are you going to? And I'm like, dude, I'm the delivery man, brother. I'm the doctor. I started this. I'm going to finish this. I'd like some assistance from you. I'd like some direction, but I'm finishing this deal. I'm taking responsibility for how this turns out good or bad and that's what great salespeople do. They don't get a deal, a contract, ink on it and then not see it all the way through till it funds. No, they're going to be in charge of the financing. They're going to be in charge of the appraisals. They're going to be in charge of all the paperwork. The legal, everything. These people are like, it'd be like, I'm the quarterback, the receiver, the fullback, the defense, the kicker, the referee and hey, I'm going to be the fans while we're at it. I'm everything rolled up in one. I roll my sleeves up and I do whatever it takes to get the job done, to be great, to deliver, to make sure I create this economy. Look, I don't want normal or average, do you? These people are no longer selling. The greats are on a mission. They're driven by a deep purpose and they know, hey, I got a job. I got to see it all the way through. My job doesn't stop here because that's my job. My job stops here because that's what it took to get it done.
